zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Leete II於1520年7月出生在英國坎布利其爾時，他的父親Thomas Leete I12歲，母親Alise Leete10歲。他和Mrs Thomas Leete至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1582年2月14日在英國亨廷格多史爾享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾歐艾金頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Leete II于1520年7月出生在英国坎布利其爾时，他的父亲Thomas Leete I12岁，母亲Alise Leete10岁。他和Mrs Thomas Leete至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1582年2月14日在英国亨廷格多史爾享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾歐艾金頓。

nameMeanings.name: Leete
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: An early American bearer of this name was one of the founders ofGuilford, CT. William Leete (c. 1613–83), a colonial governorof New Haven colony and CT, was born at Dodington, Huntingtonshire,England. He converted to Puritanism and sailed for America to escapepersecution in May 1639.

variants.name: Leet
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a watercourse orroad junction, Old English gelǣt, or a habitational namefrom Leat in Devon, or The Leete in Essex, named with this element.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Leete II was born in July 1520, in Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Thomas Leete I, was 12 and his mother, Alise Leete, was 10. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Mrs Thomas Leete. He died on 14 February 1582, in Huntingdonshire, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Oakington, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Leete II est né en juillet 1520, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Leete I, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Alise Leete, avait 10 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Mrs Thomas Leete. Il est décédé le 14 février 1582, à Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Oakington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Leete II im Juli 1520 in Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Leete I 12 und seine Mutter Alise Leete 10. Er hatte mit Mrs Thomas Leete mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Februar 1582 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Huntingdonshire, England und wurde in Oakington, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Leete II è nato il nel luglio 1520 nel Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Leete I, aveva 12 anni e il suo madre, Alise Leete, aveva 10 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Mrs Thomas Leete. Morì il 14 febbraio 1582, nel Huntingdonshire, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Oakington, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Leete IIが1520年7月にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Leete Iは12歳，母Alise Leeteは10歳であった。彼はMrs Thomas Leeteとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1582年2月14日にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアオアキントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Leete II(이)가 1520년 7월 영국 캄브리지실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Leete I(은)는 12세였고, 그의 어머니 Alise Leete(은)는 10세였다. 그는 Mrs Thomas Leete(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1582년 2월 14일 영국 헌틴그도실르에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 킨그턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Leete II nasceu em julho de 1520, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Leete I, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Alise Leete, tinha 10 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Mrs Thomas Leete. Ele faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1582, em Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Oakington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Leete II родился июль 1520 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Leete I было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Alise Leete, 10. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Mrs Thomas Leete. Он умер 14 февраля 1582 г. в местности хантингдоншир, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности оакингтон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Leete II nació en julio de 1520, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Leete I, tenía 12 años y su mamá, Alise Leete, tenía 10 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Mrs Thomas Leete. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1582, en Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Oakington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
